essential_assertions.text: assert(FriendSum(a1 as int, a2 as int, a3 as int, a4 as int, true, true, false, false) == FriendSum(a1 as int, a2 as int, a3 as int, a4 as int, false, false, true, true));
assert(FriendSum(a1 as int, a2 as int, a3 as int, a4 as int, true, false, true, false) == FriendSum(a1 as int, a2 as int, a3 as int, a4 as int, false, true, false, true));
assert(FriendSum(a1 as int, a2 as int, a3 as int, a4 as int, true, false, false, true) == FriendSum(a1 as int, a2 as int, a3 as int, a4 as int, false, true, true, false));
assert(FriendSum(a1 as int, a2 as int, a3 as int, a4 as int, false, false, false, true) == FriendSum(a1 as int, a2 as int, a3 as int, a4 as int, true, true, true, false));
assert(FriendSum(a1 as int, a2 as int, a3 as int, a4 as int, false, false, true, false) == FriendSum(a1 as int, a2 as int, a3 as int, a4 as int, true, true, false, true));
assert(FriendSum(a1 as int, a2 as int, a3 as int, a4 as int, false, true, false, false) == FriendSum(a1 as int, a2 as int, a3 as int, a4 as int, true, false, true, true));
assert(FriendSum(a1 as int, a2 as int, a3 as int, a4 as int, true, false, false, false) == FriendSum(a1 as int, a2 as int, a3 as int, a4 as int, false, true, true, true));
